issues: The draft describes the article as 'Humboldt Broncos' victories AND Richmond Sockeyes' 7-3 win' but frames it primarily around the Broncos. The article headline and lead are indeed about the Broncos, but Sockeyes content is present and should be highlighted.
The byline in the OCR is 'From L-P Wire Services', not 'L-P Wire Services' — minor but the draft omits 'From'.
The draft short description says 'Jason Phillips' but the OCR spells it 'Jason Pl Phillips' (OCR artifact) — the correct name per the roster is Jason Phillips, so that part is actually correct.

The draft mentions 'Bryon Moller' correctly in the long description but spells it 'Byron Moller' — the OCR reads 'Byron Moller' and the roster lists 'Bryon Moller'; the draft uses 'Byron' matching OCR, acceptable.
The long description is accurate in its facts but buries the Sockeyes content. The short description should lead with the Sockeyes angle for this archive.
The draft short description is acceptable in length and accuracy but could better foreground the Sockeyes result for archive relevance.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Dartmouth 7-3 in 1987 Centennial Cup round-robin play, with Jason Phillips scoring three goals; host Humboldt Broncos also won twice.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: In the 1987 Centennial Cup junior-A championship in Humboldt, Saskatchewan, the Richmond Sockeyes opened round-robin play with a 7-3 win over the Dartmouth Fuel Kings, led by Jason Phillips' hat trick; Bryon Moller, Steve Jaques, Dave Tomlinson, and Matt Hervey also scored. The host Humboldt Broncos went 2-0 in round-robin action, defeating Dartmouth 7-2 and the Pembroke Lumber Kings 4-2. Richmond stood at 1-0 after the results, with a game against Pembroke scheduled next.
review.notes: The page also contains an unrelated article about Saskatchewan junior volleyball championships (silver medal result); that content should be ignored for this archive. The headline and article focus primarily on the Broncos but the Sockeyes round-robin result is clearly present and relevant. Corrected descriptions foreground the Sockeyes content. Byline adjusted to match OCR phrasing 'From L-P Wire Services'.
